Bindings.Binding: if AtlasCFMCharDB["QuickLooks"][1] then if AtlasCFMFrame and AtlasCFMFrame:IsVisible() then AtlasCFMLootPanel_Preset1:Click() end end
if AtlasCFMCharDB["QuickLooks"][2] then if AtlasCFMFrame and AtlasCFMFrame:IsVisible() then AtlasCFMLootPanel_Preset2:Click() end end
if AtlasCFMCharDB["QuickLooks"][3] then if AtlasCFMFrame and AtlasCFMFrame:IsVisible() then AtlasCFMLootPanel_Preset3:Click() end end
if AtlasCFMCharDB["QuickLooks"][4] then if AtlasCFMFrame and AtlasCFMFrame:IsVisible() then AtlasCFMLootPanel_Preset4:Click() end end
if AtlasCFMCharDB["QuickLooks"][5] then if AtlasCFMFrame and AtlasCFMFrame:IsVisible() then AtlasCFMLootPanel_Preset5:Click() end end
if AtlasCFMCharDB["QuickLooks"][6] then if AtlasCFMFrame and AtlasCFMFrame:IsVisible() then AtlasCFMLootPanel_Preset6:Click() end end
if AtlasCFMFrame and AtlasCFMFrame:IsVisible() then AtlasCFMLootPanel_WishList:Click() end
